title: ovilla perennis
intro: Ovilla perennis, commonly known as Ovatado, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae. It is known for its potential health benefits, particularly in relation to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Ovilla perennis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions, such as wound healing, pain relief, and antiseptic effects. Additionally, the plant's bioactive compounds are believed to have anti-cancer and neuroprotective properties, although further research is necessary to confirm these findings.
